U'King LED Par Light - Model ZQ07010/ZQ0._comment: DMX spotlight, 6ch. Channel KEYS renamed to the effect-engine vocabulary so themes/effects drive it (byte layout on the wire is unchanged: 0=dimmer 1=R 2=G 3=B 4=W). color_macro deliberately keeps its own name so nothing ever writes it (would trigger the fixture's built-in color programs).

Camp Sign Zone - WS2811 via ESP32 DMX br._comment: One zone of the front camp sign (cad-items/camp-sign.svg): a single letter (or the logo disc) of 12V WS2811 strip. Not a discrete DMX fixture - the sign's ESP32 (wiring-guides/camp-sign-plan.md) receives the wired universe and maps each 8ch slot to its letter's pixel range: out = min(255, color + 0.92*w) * total_dimming/255, total_strobe>5 gates at 1-12Hz (mirrors the sim's decodeFixture so preview == wire). Byte layout matches the ZQ01424 par so raw effect frames land identically; bytes 6-7 ignored. Room 'Camp Sign' zones are in READING ORDER: 161..209=Legends, 217/225=of, 233..249=the, 257=logo, 265..305=Hidden, 313..345=Playa.
